title: Misplacement of judicial file serious: Allahabad High Court upholds action against clerk
description: The Allahabad High Court recently upheld the departmental action taken against a clerk at the district court in Rampur for misplacing a case file in the office of the Chief Judicial Magistrate in 2005 [Mahaveer Sagar v State of UP and Others].Justice Anish Kumar Gupta remarked that misplacements of judicial files must be handled with an iron hand.“Misplacement or loss of a judicial file from the record of the judiciary is very serious allegation, which impacts the administration of justice and t
